title: External connections: local LoRA/upscale drag-drop + missing guard
description: Let users drag-drop LoRA/upscale files onto their configured folder paths (each path = a drop zone, in Settings AND the picker modal), copying locally; missing models (not in any pointed-at folder) get a red dropdown item + a blocking toast on Generate. Phase 1 = local (build+test now). Phase 2 = remote upload to Pod (gated on MPI-81 rebuild). Phase 3 = remote verify. See plan.md.

attention.reason: Phase 1 (local) shipped + accepted. Live-Pod repro 2026-06-17 confirmed the silent missing-model fail (custom local upscaler shown remotely -> Pod completed-no-output, no toast). Needs REMOTE validation (Phase 2/3 upload to Pod + live-Pod sign-off) + a remote-aware guard. Gated on the MPI-81 image rebuild; validate alongside MPI-64.
